note: Normalised MTX pricing comparison across three competitor community tracker sites. All prices USD. Live shop item snapshots not captured (sites render via JS; direct Apify scrape required for daily snapshots).

premium_currency_real_money_conversion.description: What does $10 / $20 / $50 / $100 buy you in each game's premium currency?

fortnite.note: March 2026 repricing reduced V-Bucks quantities ~20-25% at most tiers

flagship_item_real_money_cost.description: What does one premium skin/item actually cost in real money at the most common purchase tier?

ea_fc_26.note: This is a gacha pack, not a guaranteed specific item. Individual player values are random.

fortnite.real_money_cost_usd: $22.48 (at $8.99/800 VB rate, need to buy 3x $8.99 packs = $26.97 for 2400 VB)
fortnite.note: Post March 2026 repricing. Previously ~$20 when $9.99 bought 1000 VB.

apex_legends.real_money_cost_usd: $17.99 (at $9.99/1000 AC rate, need 2x packs = $19.98 for 2000 AC)
apex_legends.note: Can also craft for 1,200 Crafting Metals (earnable). Recolours cheaper if base owned.

ea_fc_26.name: Season Premium Pass
ea_fc_26.note: FC Points only. Alternative: 500,000 FC Coins (earnable).

fortnite.name: Battle Pass
fortnite.note: Break-even if fully completed. Reduced from 1000/1000 in March 2026.

ea_fc_26.name: EA Play
ea_fc_26.fc_specific_benefits: 10% discount on FC Points, early access, monthly rewards

apex_legends.name: None
apex_legends.note: No subscription offering. EA Play provides minimal Apex benefits.

ea_fc_26.description: Pack-based gacha where purchased items (player cards) directly affect gameplay power
ea_fc_26.key_mechanic: Random packs with variable player quality
ea_fc_26.f2p_path: FC Coins earnable through gameplay; SBCs for specific rewards
ea_fc_26.ceiling: Unlimited - whale spending uncapped via pack purchases

fortnite.description: Direct purchase cosmetics with daily rotating shop
fortnite.key_mechanic: FOMO-driven daily rotation; collaboration skins drive spending
fortnite.f2p_path: Free tier battle pass; some free cosmetics via challenges
fortnite.ceiling: Bounded by shop inventory - each item purchased once

apex_legends.description: Mix of direct purchase store and Apex Packs (loot boxes)
apex_legends.key_mechanic: Direct store purchases + Collection Events (buy full set for Heirloom)
apex_legends.f2p_path: Crafting Metals for specific items; Legend Tokens for unlocks/recolours
apex_legends.ceiling: High during Collection Events (all items needed for Heirloom)

pricing_trends_2026.detail: V-Bucks packs give ~20-25% fewer V-Bucks for same USD price. Epic cited rising operational costs.
FC Points pricing unchanged from FC 25 in US/UK markets. Annual title release resets economy.
No recent price changes. Last global adjustment was May 2023. Golden Week event expected April 28.

gaps_and_next_steps: LIVE SHOP SNAPSHOTS: All three sites render item shops via JavaScript. WebSearch can find indexed data but cannot capture today's specific rotation. Apify actors (cheerio-scraper or web-scraper with browser rendering) needed for daily automated snapshots.
FORTNITE DAILY ITEMS: fortnite.gg/shop shows today's exact items + V-Bucks prices. Needs JS-rendered scrape.
APEX DAILY ROTATION: apexitemstore.com shows current store. Needs JS-rendered scrape.
FUT.GG STORE PACKS: fut.gg/store had no active store packs at time of research. May need to check during promo periods.
PACK ODDS: EA FC 26 pack odds are published but not captured in this scrape. Available at futnext.com/pack.
REGIONAL PRICING: Only USD captured. GBP reference included for FC Points. Full multi-region sweep per regions.json not yet done.
TIER 1 FOOTBALL COMPETITORS: UFL and eFootball community pricing not yet scraped.
APIFY PERMISSION: search-actors, call-actor, and rag-web-browser tools were permission-denied. Need tool permissions approved to run automated scraping actors.
